name: @memberjunction/ai-bridge-teams
description: MemberJunction: Microsoft Teams Realtime Bridge driver. Connects the realtime agent engine to a Teams meeting (audio in/out, diarized roster, participant mute, Teams meeting chat) via an injectable Teams calling-bot SDK seam (Azure Communication Services / Microsoft Graph cloud-communications), and contributes a Meeting Controls facilitator channel.
author: MemberJunction.com
